metadata.name: 拷贝漫画
metadata.description: 拷贝漫画 - 日漫为主，API版本，支持手动网页登录
metadata.author: ManXia Team
metadata.notes: 如果无法获取漫画列表，请尝试切换API域名。

login.description: 请在网页登录拷贝漫画账号，完成后点击应用内“完成登录”保存 Cookie

network.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:109.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/114.0

domain.name: API域名
domain.description: 选择可用的API域名（如果某个域名不可用请尝试其他）

filter.description: 筛选漫画（支持排序、地区、题材组合）

favorites_legacy.description: 登录后获取收藏书架作品

actions.code: (function(){const rawOffset='{{offset}}';const offset=/^\d+$/.test(rawOffset)?rawOffset:'0';const origin='https://www.mangacopy.com';const dec=(v)=>{try{return decodeURIComponent(v)}catch(_){return v}};const getCookie=(name)=>{const arr=document.cookie?document.cookie.split(';'):[];for(let i=0;i<arr.length;i++){const p=arr[i].trim();if(p.startsWith(name+'=')){return dec(p.substring(name.length+1));}}return '';};const token=getCookie('token');const csrf=getCookie('csrftoken');const txt=(v)=>String(v||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const abs=(u)=>{try{return new URL(u,origin).toString()}catch(_){return''}};const parseId=(u)=>{const m=String(u||'').match(/\/comic\/([^/?#]+)/i);return m?m[1]:''};const normalize=(item)=>{const src=item&&typeof item==='object'?item:{};const comic=src.comic||src.comics||src.comic_info||src.book||src;const id=String(comic.path_word||comic.slug||comic.uuid||comic.id||src.path_word||src.slug||src.uuid||src.id||parseId(comic.url||src.url||'')||'');if(!id){return null;}let author='';if(Array.isArray(comic.author)&&comic.author.length>0){const a0=comic.author[0];author=txt(typeof a0==='string'?a0:(a0&&a0.name)||'');}else{author=txt(comic.author||src.author||'');}const title=txt(comic.name||comic.title||src.name||src.title||'');const cover=txt(comic.cover||comic.image||comic.img||src.cover||src.image||src.img||'');const url=abs(comic.url||src.url||('/comic/'+id));return{id:id,title:title,url:url,cover:cover,author:author};};const pickList=(obj)=>{if(!obj||typeof obj!=='object'){return [];}const arrs=[];if(Array.isArray(obj)){arrs.push(obj);}if(obj.results){if(Array.isArray(obj.results.list))arrs.push(obj.results.list);if(Array.isArray(obj.results.comics))arrs.push(obj.results.comics);if(Array.isArray(obj.results))arrs.push(obj.results);}if(obj.data){if(Array.isArray(obj.data.list))arrs.push(obj.data.list);if(Array.isArray(obj.data.comics))arrs.push(obj.data.comics);if(Array.isArray(obj.data))arrs.push(obj.data);}if(Array.isArray(obj.list))arrs.push(obj.list);for(let i=0;i<arrs.length;i++){if(arrs[i]&&arrs[i].length>0){return arrs[i];}}return arrs.length>0?arrs[0]:[];};const request=(url)=>{try{const xhr=new XMLHttpRequest();xhr.open('GET',url,false);xhr.setRequestHeader('Accept','application/json, text/plain, */*');xhr.setRequestHeader('Version','2025.11.21');xhr.setRequestHeader('Region','0');xhr.setRequestHeader('Webp','0');xhr.setRequestHeader('X-Requested-With','XMLHttpRequest');xhr.setRequestHeader('Referer',origin+'/web/person/shujia');if(csrf){xhr.setRequestHeader('x-csrftoken',csrf);xhr.setRequestHeader('X-CSRFToken',csrf);}if(token){xhr.setRequestHeader('token',token);xhr.setRequestHeader('authorization',token);xhr.setRequestHeader('Authorization','Token '+token);}xhr.send(null);if(xhr.status!==200||!xhr.responseText){return [];}const parsed=JSON.parse(xhr.responseText);const list=pickList(parsed);const out=[];const seen={};for(let i=0;i<list.length;i++){const row=normalize(list[i]);if(!row||seen[row.id]){continue;}seen[row.id]=1;out.push(row);}return out;}catch(_){return [];}};const apis=['https://www.mangacopy.com/api/v3/member/collect/comics?limit=12&offset='+offset+'&free_type=1&ordering=-datetime_modifier','https://www.mangacopy.com/api/v3/member/collect/comics?limit=12&offset='+offset+'&free_type=1','https://www.mangacopy.com/api/v3/member/collect/comics?limit=12&offset='+offset];for(let i=0;i<apis.length;i++){const out=request(apis[i]);if(out.length>0){return JSON.stringify(out);}}const links=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/comic/"]'));const out=[];const seen={};for(let i=0;i<links.length;i++){const a=links[i];const href=abs(a.getAttribute('href')||'');const id=parseId(href);if(!id||seen[id]){continue;}seen[id]=1;const card=a.closest('li,article,.item,.card,.comic-item,.manga-item,.book-item,.list-item,div')||a;const img=card.querySelector('img');const titleEl=card.querySelector('h1,h2,h3,h4,.title,.name,.comic-name,.book-name');out.push({id:id,title:txt(a.getAttribute('title')||(titleEl?titleEl.textContent:'')||a.textContent||''),url:href,cover:txt(img?(img.getAttribute('data-src')||img.getAttribute('data-original')||img.getAttribute('src')||''):''),author:''});}return JSON.stringify(out);})()

history_legacy.description: 登录后获取浏览历史作品

actions.code: (function(){const rawOffset='{{offset}}';const offset=/^\d+$/.test(rawOffset)?rawOffset:'0';const origin='https://www.mangacopy.com';const dec=(v)=>{try{return decodeURIComponent(v)}catch(_){return v}};const getCookie=(name)=>{const arr=document.cookie?document.cookie.split(';'):[];for(let i=0;i<arr.length;i++){const p=arr[i].trim();if(p.startsWith(name+'=')){return dec(p.substring(name.length+1));}}return '';};const token=getCookie('token');const csrf=getCookie('csrftoken');const txt=(v)=>String(v||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const abs=(u)=>{try{return new URL(u,origin).toString()}catch(_){return''}};const parseId=(u)=>{const m=String(u||'').match(/\/comic\/([^/?#]+)/i);return m?m[1]:''};const normalize=(item)=>{const src=item&&typeof item==='object'?item:{};const comic=src.comic||src.comics||src.comic_info||src.book||src;const id=String(comic.path_word||comic.slug||comic.uuid||comic.id||src.path_word||src.slug||src.uuid||src.id||parseId(comic.url||src.url||'')||'');if(!id){return null;}let author='';if(Array.isArray(comic.author)&&comic.author.length>0){const a0=comic.author[0];author=txt(typeof a0==='string'?a0:(a0&&a0.name)||'');}else{author=txt(comic.author||src.author||'');}const title=txt(comic.name||comic.title||src.name||src.title||'');const cover=txt(comic.cover||comic.image||comic.img||src.cover||src.image||src.img||'');const url=abs(comic.url||src.url||('/comic/'+id));return{id:id,title:title,url:url,cover:cover,author:author};};const pickList=(obj)=>{if(!obj||typeof obj!=='object'){return [];}const arrs=[];if(Array.isArray(obj)){arrs.push(obj);}if(obj.results){if(Array.isArray(obj.results.list))arrs.push(obj.results.list);if(Array.isArray(obj.results.comics))arrs.push(obj.results.comics);if(Array.isArray(obj.results))arrs.push(obj.results);}if(obj.data){if(Array.isArray(obj.data.list))arrs.push(obj.data.list);if(Array.isArray(obj.data.comics))arrs.push(obj.data.comics);if(Array.isArray(obj.data))arrs.push(obj.data);}if(Array.isArray(obj.list))arrs.push(obj.list);for(let i=0;i<arrs.length;i++){if(arrs[i]&&arrs[i].length>0){return arrs[i];}}return arrs.length>0?arrs[0]:[];};const request=(url)=>{try{const xhr=new XMLHttpRequest();xhr.open('GET',url,false);xhr.setRequestHeader('Accept','application/json, text/plain, */*');xhr.setRequestHeader('Version','2025.11.21');xhr.setRequestHeader('Region','0');xhr.setRequestHeader('Webp','0');xhr.setRequestHeader('X-Requested-With','XMLHttpRequest');xhr.setRequestHeader('Referer',origin+'/web/person/liulan');if(csrf){xhr.setRequestHeader('x-csrftoken',csrf);xhr.setRequestHeader('X-CSRFToken',csrf);}if(token){xhr.setRequestHeader('token',token);xhr.setRequestHeader('authorization',token);xhr.setRequestHeader('Authorization','Token '+token);}xhr.send(null);if(xhr.status!==200||!xhr.responseText){return [];}const parsed=JSON.parse(xhr.responseText);const list=pickList(parsed);const out=[];const seen={};for(let i=0;i<list.length;i++){const row=normalize(list[i]);if(!row||seen[row.id]){continue;}seen[row.id]=1;out.push(row);}return out;}catch(_){return [];}};const apis=['https://www.mangacopy.com/api/kb/web/browses?limit=12&offset='+offset+'&free_type=1','https://www.mangacopy.com/api/kb/web/browses?limit=12&offset='+offset,'https://www.mangacopy.com/api/v3/member/history/comics?limit=12&offset='+offset];for(let i=0;i<apis.length;i++){const out=request(apis[i]);if(out.length>0){return JSON.stringify(out);}}const links=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/comic/"]'));const out=[];const seen={};for(let i=0;i<links.length;i++){const a=links[i];const href=abs(a.getAttribute('href')||'');const id=parseId(href);if(!id||seen[id]){continue;}seen[id]=1;const card=a.closest('li,article,.item,.card,.comic-item,.manga-item,.book-item,.list-item,div')||a;const img=card.querySelector('img');const titleEl=card.querySelector('h1,h2,h3,h4,.title,.name,.comic-name,.book-name');out.push({id:id,title:txt(a.getAttribute('title')||(titleEl?titleEl.textContent:'')||a.textContent||''),url:href,cover:txt(img?(img.getAttribute('data-src')||img.getAttribute('data-original')||img.getAttribute('src')||''):''),author:''});}return JSON.stringify(out);})()

favorites.description: 登录后获取收藏书架作品（API）

history.description: 登录后获取浏览记录作品（API）

getMangaDetailWithChapters.description: 一次性获取漫画详情和章节列表

notes: API版本 v3.1 - 基于Tachiyomi拷贝漫画扩展v1.4.78分析
支持拷贝漫画域名: api.mangacopy.com, mapi.copy20.com, api.2025copy.com
支持热辣漫画域名: mapi.hotmangasd.com, api.manga2025.com等
域名切换: 在设置中选择API域名即可生效
图片需要根据words数组索引进行排序
支持手动网页登录并保存 Cookie
当前登录入口绑定 www.mangacopy.com，镜像 API 的登录态复用情况仍需继续联调确认
